Ancient Fishing Pole  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Skill Mod: Fishing +3% (6 Max)
HP: +75
Effect: Enduring Breath (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 1.5 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Ancient Fishing Pole
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Skill Mod: Fishing +3% (6 Max)
HP: +75
Effect: Enduring Breath (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 1.5 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Pirates Fishing Pole
Item Type:Fishing Pole
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Happyfeet Funkmaster
Lucy Entry By:Divine
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 00:02:10
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Siren's Grotto
NPC Name
a coldspine seahorse
a servant swordfish
Fellspine


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Siren's Grotto


Uploaded November 3rd, 2022 by halfridge
Updated November 4th, 2022
Send a correction
Post Comment
Ancient Fishing Pole is unbreakable now
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2019 at 11:10 PM Rating: Excellent
nytmare
Sage
1,344 posts
Ancient Fishing Pole was made unbreakable with the patch of July 18, 2018. It does not have the Expendable tag.
▲ Page top
Ancient Fishing Pole is unbreakable now
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2024 at 1:29 AM Rating: Decent
Roadklnurse
4 posts
nytmare wrote:
Ancient Fishing Pole was made unbreakable with the patch of July 18, 2018. It does not have the Expendable tag.




I was fishing with my Ancient Fishing Pole today 12/17/24 and Guess What??? It broke and it now gone!!! To say I'm pissed off is the understatement of the Century!!! It took me forever to get this drop for EQ to just "Poof" it!! [:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:][:mad:]

Ancient Fishing Pole is unbreakable now

I just Looted one today, I'm not sure what mob it dropped off of because I was speed looting to zone off a train I made.

still drops
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2009 at 1:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592347333397
Scholar
244 posts
Picked one up when I was doing my Ranger 1.5 last year (July 08) so it still drops.
Yay for enduring breath fishing poles. Comes in handy when a big fish pulls you in off the shore.
▲ Page top
Rare?
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2004 at 2:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259816431
7 posts
Been hunting here now for a few weeks and I have yet to see one of these drop after killing ooodles of seahorses. Have gotten two seahorse belts so far, but no fishing pole. Not that I am worried about it, just reporting what I have noticed so far. Either they removed this from the drop table with the revamp or it is insanely rare now. That goes for the seashell with EB charges on it.. got one so far and none since. Go figure..
▲ Page top
RE: Rare?
QuoteReply

I killed a couple of seahorses after zoning in to SG and they both dropped this.

Suggestion
QuoteReply
# Dec 05 2003 at 8:10 AM Rating: Decent
alanray
247 posts
I have just read the following below and I was simply thinking who in their right mind would fish with this EB item? These items are hard enough to get and to risk breaking it is like unimaginable.. If people want to do fishing then do the Fishermans companion quest and receive a nice summonable fishing pole with a bonus to fishing + it summons ale.. What more can one ask for

cheers
____________________________
[wowsig]2433493[/wowsig]
▲ Page top
Yes it breakith.
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2003 at 6:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591792063196
1 post
I was hunting with my guild in SG.. they were a few higher lvls then me, I was just tagging along. Anyways one of these drops, and I get all giddy about this kind of crap because I got all my gear from auctioning and getting lucky... and little items like this always cheer me up... So in between poles I'd fish and bug the hell out of them saying how cool my new fishing rod is... and I'm just in a great ol' mood and it snaps. It just breaks on me, so I get this flashback of when I was hiking up a stream in the woods when I tripped and broke my new 100$ + Fishing rod and... yes I left the zone. Couldn't take it. Plus the fishing there sucks.
▲ Page top
It does break
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2002 at 3:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361699241
View User Forum
8 posts
Was fishing in CS with it and it broke
▲ Page top
Fishin' Pole
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2002 at 6:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772995121
39 posts
Got one last night off seahorse. They now drop with a +3% to fishing modification, hehe.
▲ Page top
learn to swim!
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2001 at 3:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247212723
View User Forum
Scholar
48 posts
Fishing poles can actually break a lot. I have a char with fishing skills over 70 and she still breaks poles all the time. So no, if you want this item for the effect, don't fish with it.

It's a good idea to build your swimming skills anyway, regardless of whether or not you have access to enduring breath. Go swim in either Freeport, Butcherblock, or Halas. Neriak is good if you're a dark elf.
▲ Page top
RE: learn to swim!
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2002 at 6:39 PM Rating: Good
Bofor
Scholar
326 posts
A rogue can improve 2 skills at one time if he/she wants to pick locks on the stone door to The Hole in the Paineel zone. Over time, and with patience, my 51 rogue maxxed his pick lock skill and is close to maxxing his swimming skill.

A suggestion if anyone is interested...

Cibbas Sneakystone
____________________________
Bo knows jewelry.
▲ Page top
Found!
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2001 at 10:28 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757961406
View User Forum
3 posts

We've found several of these ancient fishing poles over the last couple weeks. They seem to be an uncommon drop from Coldspine Seahorses. We haven't been able to confirm that these still drop from Servant Swordfish.

EB
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2001 at 11:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760340413
1 post
The best thing I have noticed about this zone is that there are alot of items that drop that have EB as an effect. Also, although I am a monk it is good to see so many bard items drop somewhere. Finally a nice undercamped (for now ) zone.

Enduring Breath Effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2001 at 2:56 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous

Since when weilding this, you don't need to breath, could you have hotkey slots setup for inventory items, and when your breath runs out, you could quickly switch to this fishing pole, get a breath, and switch back?

▲ Page top
No
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2001 at 10:06 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965864169
76 posts
You can't hotkey inventory switches. Wish you could but you can't =/
▲ Page top
RE: No
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2001 at 2:28 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767868531
7 posts
He meant you hot key your melee slot and an inventory slot, then just switch the items in the Hot Key window without needing to open the inventory window. Bards do this all the time. :)
▲ Page top
RE: No
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 4:33 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756055432
345 posts
Not to mention a good soloist on a pvp server hehehe...

-Renmazuo Skoaldiak, TZ
▲ Page top
Another inaccuracy
QuoteReply
# May 28 2001 at 6:27 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Not only is the effect permanent, and not triggered, but the pole also drops off more than just the swordfish. We had two drop tonight, one off a swordfish, I looted mine off a coldspine seahorse.

Another victim of the 'Woot triggerable EB!' joke khazam has played on so many.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 01 2001 at 7:45 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) nt
Fishing Pole

# Apr 25 2001 at 3:36 PM Rating: Default

Primary slot

# Apr 19 2001 at 3:05 AM Rating: Decent

55 posts
Although the EB is nice, it's kind of useless to pure meleers. Too bad it's not triggered, I would have maybe thought about getting this, but, again, since it goes in my primary slot (where I need my primary weapon), I'll look for something else, fishbone earring maybe.

▲ Page top
how it work?
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2001 at 12:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246925321
5 posts
so we need to carry bait with us inorder for it to work? can we fish underwater? and does it catch anything different then shoes and rusty dagger? perhaps old tire?
▲ Page top
RE: how it work?
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2001 at 11:42 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It works exactly like a normal fishing pole. Not sure about breakage though, because I'm not gonna use mine to fish... The effect is incorrect on the description though. It is not triggerred. It is a full time effect when the fishing pole is equipped. Very nice alternative to the FB earring here.

Fujin Windhammer
50th Cleric of Tunare
Druzzil Ro
▲ Page top
RE: how it work?
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2001 at 11:00 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yes it will break and yes the effect is active while holding

QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2003 at 6:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361724592
1 post
Not quite a billion items, but more than 3:

Amulet of the Grey Wastes
Ancient Fishing Pole
Aquatic Haunting Potion
Bag of Bone Dust
Bowl of Watery Protection
Charred Bone Ring
Deep Six Cutlass
Drums of the Beast
Earring of Death
Enchanted Velium Mask
Fish Gill Extract (potion)
Fishbone Earring
Fishgill Necksash (no longer drops)
Greaves of the Deep Sea
Helm of the Deep Sea
Hero's Khukri
Imbued Shield of Paineel
Kerran Fishing Spear
Knotted Turtlebone Ring
Lodizal Shell Shield
Lodizal Shell Shield (Back)
Lord of Pain's Khukri
Moss Mask
Net of the Deep Sea
Orb of the Deep Sea
Ornately Runed Shell Necklace
Potion of Vox's Vitality
Rebreather
Riptide Spear
Runed Sea Shell (Enduring Breath)
Runed Shell Necklace
Sapphire Studded Mantle
Shadow Pearl Earring
Shell Trimmed Bracer
Shield of Prexus
Shissar Eye Earring
Singing Steel Gauntlets
Sleeves of the Kelpmaidens
Staff of the Waterwalker
Vial of Egg Whites
Waterlogged Boots
